mapper.select:
select distinct t4.id, t4.Breed,t5.WorkShop from tbweight t2 left join tbprice t3 on t2.ProductType = t3.ID left join tbbreed t4 on t3.ProductType = t4.ID left join tbworkshop t5 on t4.WorkShopID = t5.id where 1=1
and t5.WorkShop=#{workShop}
select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t1.idcardno) xh, t1.idcardno,cardNo as workNo,t1.name,t2.BankNo from tblregister t1 left join tbtempworker t2 on t1.idcardno = t2.IDNo;

select distinct date_format(t2.WeightTime,'%Y-%m-%d') as WeightTime, t3.Price from tbweight t2 left join tbprice t3 on t2.ProductType = t3.ID left join tbbreed t4 on t3.ProductType = t4.ID where t4.id=#{productId}

select IDNo as cardno,SUM(Weight) as weight, date_format(t2.WeightTime,'%Y-%m-%d') as weighttime, concat(date_format(t2.WeightTime,'%Y-%m-%d'),'(',t3.Price,'元/kg)') as weighttimeStr,t4.Breed as breed,t5.WorkShop as workshop from tbweight t2 left join tbprice t3 on t2.ProductType = t3.ID left join tbbreed t4 on t3.ProductType = t4.ID left join tbworkshop t5 on t4.WorkShopID = t5.ID where t2.IDNo=#{idNo} group by IDNo, WeightTime,t4.Breed;

select IDNo as cardno,SUM(Weight) as weight,sum(t3.Price*t2.Weight) as productprice, t4.Breed as bread,t5.WorkShop as workshop from tbweight t2 left join tbprice t3 on t2.ProductType = t3.ID left join tbbreed t4 on t3.ProductType = t4.ID left join tbworkshop t5 on t4.WorkShopID = t5.ID where t2.IDNo=#{idNo} and t4.breed=#{productName} group by IDNo, t4.Breed

select IDNo as cardno,SUM(Weight) as weight,sum(t3.Price*t2.Weight) as productprice, t4.Breed as bread,t5.WorkShop as workshop from tbweight t2 left join tbprice t3 on t2.ProductType = t3.ID left join tbbreed t4 on t3.ProductType = t4.ID left join tbworkshop t5 on t4.WorkShopID = t5.ID where t2.IDNo=#{idNo} and t5.WorkShop=#{workShop} group by IDNo
